info.description: With the Selling Partner API for Merchant Fulfillment, you can build applications that sellers can use to purchase shipping for non-Prime and Prime orders using Amazon's Buy Shipping Services.
info.title: Selling Partner API for Merchant Fulfillment

delete.description:
Cancel the shipment indicated by the specified shipment identifier.

**Usage Plan:**

| Rate (requests per second) | Burst |
| ---- | ---- |
| 1 | 1 |

The `x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit` response header returns the usage plan rate limits that are applied to the requested operation when available. The preceding table indicates the default rate and burst values for this operation. Selling partners whose business demands require higher throughput may have higher rate and burst values than those shown here. For more information, refer to [Usage Plans and Rate Limits in the SP-API](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/usage-plans-and-rate-limits-in-the-sp-api).

parameters.name: shipmentId
parameters.description: The Amazon-defined shipment identifier for the shipment to cancel.

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

400.description: Request has missing or invalid parameters and cannot be parsed.

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

errors.message: 1 validation error detected: Value 'TEST_CASE_400' at 'shipmentId' failed to satisfy constraint: Member must satisfy regular expression pattern: [0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12}

401.description: The request's authorization header is not formatted correctly or does not contain a valid token.

403.description: Indicates that access to the resource is forbidden. Possible reasons include Access Denied, Unauthorized, Expired Token, or Invalid Signature.

404.description: The resource specified does not exist.

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

429.description: The frequency of requests was greater than allowed.

500.description: An unexpected condition occurred that prevented the server from fulfilling the request.

503.description: Temporary overloading or maintenance of the server.

Length.description: The length dimension. If you don't specify `PredefinedPackageDimensions`, you must specify the length.

Width.description: The width dimension. If you don't specify `PredefinedPackageDimensions`, you must specify the width.

Height.description: The height dimension. If you don't specify `PredefinedPackageDimensions`, you must specify the height.

Unit.description: The unit of measurement. If you don't specify `PredefinedPackageDimensions`, you must specify the unit.

PackageDimensions.description: The dimensions of a package contained in a shipment.

DangerousGoodsDetails.description: Details related to any dangerous goods or items that are shipped.

UnitedNationsRegulatoryId.description: The specific UNID of the item being shipped.

TransportationRegulatoryClass.description: The specific regulatory class of the shipped item.

PackingGroup.description: The specific packaging group of the item being shipped.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Packing group I indicates great danger.
Packing group II indicates medium danger.
Packing group III indicates minor danger.

PackingInstruction.description: The specific packing instruction of the item being shipped.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Ion PI966 Section I (LiBa with equipment).
Ion PI966 Section II (LiBa with equipment).
Ion PI967 Section I (LiBa in equipment).
Ion PI967 Section II (LiBa in equipment).
Metal PI969 Section I (LiBa with equipment).
Metal PI969 Section II (LiBa with equipment).
Metal PI970 Section I (LiBa in equipment).
Metal PI970 Section II (LiBa in equipment).

ExcludedBenefits.description: A list of excluded benefits. Refer to the `ExcludeBenefit` object for further documentation.

OrderItemId.description: An Amazon-defined identifier for an individual item in an order.

CountryCode.description: The two-letter country code in [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iban.com/country-codes) format.

AvailableDeliveryExperienceOption.description: The available delivery confirmation options, and the fee charged, if any.

FileType.description: The file type for a label.

DeclaredValue.description: The declared value of the shipment. The carrier uses this value to determine the amount to use to insure the shipment. If `DeclaredValue` is greater than the carrier's minimum insurance amount, the seller is charged for the additional insurance, as determined by the carrier. For information about optional insurance coverage, refer to Seller Central Help: [UK](https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/gp/help/200204080), [US](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/200204080).

CarrierWillPickUp.description: When true, the carrier will pick up the package. Note: Scheduled carrier pickup is available only using Dynamex (US), DPD (UK), and Royal Mail (UK).

ShippingServiceOptions.description: Extra services provided by a carrier.

Contents.description: Data for printing labels encoded into a Base64, GZip-compressed string.

Checksum.description: An MD5 hash to validate the PDF document data, in the form of a Base64 string.

RateItemCharge.description: The monetary value for the RateItem.

RateItem.description: Rate item for shipping costs and adjustments.

TransparencyCode.description:
The transparency code associated with the item. Determine the transparency serial number with:

**1D or 2D barcode:** This has a **T** logo. Submit either the 29-character alpha-numeric identifier beginning with **AZ** or **ZA**, or the 38-character Serialized Global Trade Item Number (SGTIN).
**2D barcode SN:** Submit the 7- to 20-character serial number barcode, that likely has the prefix **SN**. The serial number is applied to the same side of the packaging as the GTIN (UPC/EAN/ISBN) barcode.
**QR code SN:** Submit the URL that the QR code generates.

PredefinedPackageDimensions.description: An enumeration of predefined parcel tokens. If you specify a `PredefinedPackageDimensions` token, you are not obligated to use a branded package from a carrier. For example, if you specify the `FedEx_Box_10kg` token, you do not have to use that particular package from FedEx. You are only obligated to use a box that matches the dimensions specified by the token. Note: Carriers can have restrictions on the type of package allowed for certain ship methods. Check the carrier website for details. Example: Flat rate pricing is available when materials are sent by USPS in a USPS-produced Flat Rate envelope or box.

PackageDimension.description: A number that represents the given package dimension.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The unit of length is inches.
The unit of length is centimeters.

StateOrProvinceCode.description: The state or province code. This is a required field in Canada, US, and UK marketplaces, and for shipments that originate in China.

Benefits.description: Benefits that are included and excluded for each shipping offer. Benefits represents services provided by Amazon (for example, `CLAIMS_PROTECTED`) when sellers purchase shipping through Amazon. Benefit details are made available for any shipment placed on or after January 1st 2024 00:00 UTC.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The seller purchased a label by calling the `createShipment` operation.

The seller requested a label refund by calling the `cancelShipment` operation, and the refund request is being processed by the carrier. Note: A seller can create a new shipment for an order while `Status = RefundPending` for a canceled shipment. After you request a label refund (by calling `cancelShipment`), the status of the order remains `Shipped`.

The label refund request is rejected by the carrier. A refund request is rejected because the cancellation window has expired or the carrier has already accepted the shipment for delivery. Cancellation policies vary by carrier. For more information about carrier cancellation policies, refer to the Seller Central Help for your marketplace.
The refund has been approved and credited to the seller's account.

ItemLevelSellerInputsList.description: A list of additional seller inputs required to ship this item using the chosen shipping service.

IsHazmat.description: When true, the item qualifies as hazardous materials (hazmat). Defaults to false.

Item.description: An Amazon order item identifier and a quantity.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Fluid ounce - Imperial unit of volume.

ExcludedBenefitReasonCodes.description: List of reasons why a benefit is excluded for a shipping offer (for example, `LATE_DELIVERY_RISK`).

ItemList.description: The list of items you want to include in a shipment.

CustomTextForLabel.description: Custom text to print on the label. Note: Custom text is only included on labels that are in ZPL format (ZPL203). FedEx does not support `CustomTextForLabel`.

IncludePackingSlipWithLabel.description: When true, include a packing slip with the label.

LabelFormatOption.description: The label format details and whether to include a packing slip.

AvailableCarrierWillPickUpOptionsList.description: List of available carrier pickup options.

StandardIdForLabel.description: The type of standard identifier to print on the label.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: An Amazon-defined order identifier in 3-7-7 format.

ShipToAddress.description: The destination address for the shipment.

Insurance.description: If you specify `DeclaredValue` in a previous call to the `createShipment` operation, then `Insurance` indicates the shipment insurance amount that the carrier uses. If `DeclaredValue` isn't with a previous call to the `createShipment` operation, then the shipment is insured for the carrier's minimum insurance amount, or the combined sale prices that the items are listed for in the shipment.

Label.description: Data for creating a shipping label and dimensions for printing the label. If the shipment is canceled, an empty label is returned.

CreatedDate.description: The date and time the shipment is created.

LastUpdatedDate.description: The date and time of the last update.

Shipment.description: The details of a shipment. Includes the shipment status.

AvailableCarrierWillPickUpOption.description: Indicates whether the carrier will pick up the package, and what fee is charged, if any.

AvailableDeliveryExperienceOptionsList.description: List of available delivery experience options.

AmazonOrderId.description: An Amazon-defined order identifier, in 3-7-7 format.

CurrencyCode.description: Three-digit currency code in ISO 4217 format.

AdditionalInputFieldName.description: The name of the additional input field.

AdditionalSellerInputs.description: An additional set of seller inputs required to purchase shipping.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The carrier will pick up the package.
The seller is responsible for arranging pickup or dropping off the package to the carrier.

ErrorList.description: A list of error responses returned when a request is unsuccessful.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Delivery confirmation with signature. Required for DPD (UK).

code.description: An error code that identifies the type of error that occurred.

message.description: A message that describes the error condition in a human-readable form.

details.description: Additional details that can help the caller understand or fix the issue.

Error.description: Error response returned when the request is unsuccessful.

ExcludedBenefit.description: An object representing an excluded benefit that is excluded for a shipping offer or rate.

Benefit.description: A benefit that is being excluded from a shipment.

ShippingServiceName.description: A plain text representation of a carrier's shipping service. For example, "UPS Ground" or "FedEx Standard Overnight".

ShippingServiceOfferId.description: An Amazon-defined shipping service offer identifier.

ShipDate.description: The date that the carrier will ship the package.

EarliestEstimatedDeliveryDate.description: The earliest date by which the shipment will be delivered.

LatestEstimatedDeliveryDate.description: The latest date by which the shipment will be delivered.

Rate.description: The amount that the carrier will charge for the shipment.

RateWithAdjustments.description: The amount that the carrier will charge for the shipment with adjustments.

AdjustmentItemList.description: A list of adjustments applied to a shipping service.

ShippingServiceOptions.description: Extra services offered by the carrier.

RequiresAdditionalSellerInputs.description: When true, additional seller inputs are required.

ShippingService.description: A shipping service offer made by a carrier.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Delivery confirmation with an adult signature.
Delivery confirmation with a signature. Required for DPD (UK).
RateItem is included but not guaranteed to offer for the shipping service.

AdditionalSellerInputsList.description: A list of additional seller input pairs required to purchase shipping.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Zebra Programming Language (zpl) format, 203 dots per inch resolution.
Zebra Programming Language (zpl) format, 300 dots per inch resolution.
The default provided by the shipping service.

DataType.description: The data type of the additional information.

ValueAsString.description: The value when the data type is string.

ValueAsBoolean.description: The value when the data type is boolean.

ValueAsInteger.description: The value when the data type is integer.

ValueAsTimestamp.description: The value when the data type is a date-time formatted string.

AdditionalSellerInput.description: Additional information required to purchase shipping.

PostalCode.description: The zip code or postal code.

AddressName.description: The name of the addressee, or business name.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The unit of weight is ounces.
The unit of weight is grams.

Label.description: Data for creating a shipping label and dimensions for printing the label.

LabelDimensions.description: Dimensions for printing a shipping label.

errors.description: One or more unexpected errors occurred during the `cancelShipment` operation.

TrackingId.description: The shipment tracking identifier provided by the carrier.
